metadata.task_title: Capitalize the starting letter of every word in Word and add page number
metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 50.docx in Document > Task 50 folder, capitalize the first letter of every word in the title and add the page number
metadata.context: I am writing an article on Word and I want to modify the title format based on the guidelines.
